channel.title: 195th Annual General Conference

itunes:owner.itunes:name: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints

channel.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints

item.title: Sustaining of General Authorities, Area Seventies, and General Officers
item.description:
Sustaining of General Authorities, Area Seventies, and General Officers by Presented by President Dallin H. Oaks, First Counselor in the First Presidency given in the Saturday Morning session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
undefined
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Presented by President Dallin H. Oaks, First Counselor in the First Presidency

item.title: Church Auditing Department Report, 2024
item.description:
Church Auditing Department Report, 2024 by Presented by Jared B. Larson, Managing Director, Church Auditing Department given in the Saturday Morning session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
To the First Presidency of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Presented by Jared B. Larson, Managing Director, Church Auditing Department

item.title: As a Little Child
item.description:
As a Little Child by President Jeffrey R. Holland, Acting President of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Morning session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
I testify that babies and children and youth are images of the kingdom of God flourishing on earth in all of its strength and beauty.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Jeffrey R. Holland, Acting President of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Spiritually Whole in Him
item.description:
Spiritually Whole in Him by President Camille N. Johnson, Relief Society General President given in the Saturday Morning session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
Wholeness does not necessarily mean physical and emotional restoration in this life. Wholeness is born of faith in and conversion to Jesus Christ.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Camille N. Johnson, Relief Society General President

item.title: Right Before Our Eyes
item.description:
Right Before Our Eyes by Elder Ronald A. Rasband, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Morning session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints is growing in members and families, missions and missionaries, meetinghouses and temples.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Ronald A. Rasband, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: The Atonement of Jesus Christ Provides the Ultimate Rescue
item.description:
The Atonement of Jesus Christ Provides the Ultimate Rescue by Elder Quentin L. Cook, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Morning session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
As we turn to Jesus Christ, the Savior of the world, He rescues us from the storms of life through His Atonement.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Quentin L. Cook, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: My Love for the Savior Is My “Why”
item.description:
My Love for the Savior Is My “Why” by Elder Ricardo P. Giménez, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Morning session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
I love our Savior. This is the real and most powerful reason why I do what I do.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Ricardo P. Giménez, Of the Seventy

item.title: “Draw Near unto Me”
item.description:
“Draw Near unto Me” by President Henry B. Eyring, Second Counselor in the First Presidency given in the Saturday Morning session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
Jesus Christ loves each of us. He offers us the opportunity to draw closer to Him.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Henry B. Eyring, Second Counselor in the First Presidency

item.title: Cherishing Life
item.description:
Cherishing Life by Elder Neil L. Andersen, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
Life is a most precious part of our Father’s perfect plan, and by His decree we cherish and preserve life.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Neil L. Andersen, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Divine Authority, Sublime Young Men
item.description:
Divine Authority, Sublime Young Men by President Steven J. Lund, Young Men General President given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
I am forever grateful that holders of the Aaronic Priesthood, with its powers, ordinances, and duties, do bless all of us.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Steven J. Lund, Young Men General President

item.title: “Return unto Me … That I May Heal You”
item.description:
“Return unto Me … That I May Heal You” by Elder S. Mark Palmer, Of the Presidency of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
There is rejoicing in heaven over those who return. It is not too late for you to come back.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder S. Mark Palmer, Of the Presidency of the Seventy

item.title: Faith: A Bond of Trust and Loyalty
item.description:
Faith: A Bond of Trust and Loyalty by Elder Sandino Roman, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
Faith sprouts as we trust in Jesus Christ and blooms as we are faithful and loyal to Him.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Sandino Roman, Of the Seventy

item.title: Personal Preparation to Meet the Savior
item.description:
Personal Preparation to Meet the Savior by Elder Dale G. Renlund, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
Follow the Savior’s teachings. His instructions are neither mysterious nor complex. When we follow them, we do not need to fear or be anxious.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Dale G. Renlund, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: True to the Faith That Our Parents Have Cherished
item.description:
True to the Faith That Our Parents Have Cherished by Elder Hans T. Boom, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
Please learn and receive strength from the faith and testimonies of those who came before you.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Hans T. Boom, Of the Seventy

item.title: “By This All Will Know That You Are My Disciples”
item.description:
“By This All Will Know That You Are My Disciples” by Elder Dieter F. Uchtdorf, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
Our love for God and His children is a powerful testimony to the world that this is truly the Savior’s Church.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Dieter F. Uchtdorf, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: And We Talk of Christ
item.description:
And We Talk of Christ by Elder Gary E. Stevenson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Evening session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
We are followers of Jesus Christ, and we seek to both receive and share His light.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Gary E. Stevenson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Thou Art the Christ
item.description:
Thou Art the Christ by Sister Amy A. Wright, First Counselor in the Primary General Presidency given in the Saturday Evening session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
()

item.title: The Plan of Mercy
item.description:
The Plan of Mercy by Elder James R. Rasband, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Evening session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
The Lord is merciful and our Heavenly Father’s plan of salvation is truly a plan of mercy.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder James R. Rasband, Of the Seventy

item.title: Our Heavenly Guidance System
item.description:
Our Heavenly Guidance System by Elder Sergio R. Vargas, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Evening session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
As we focus our lives on Jesus Christ, we will find our way home, enduring to the end and rejoicing to the end.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Sergio R. Vargas, Of the Seventy

item.title: Worship
item.description:
Worship by Elder D. Todd Christofferson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Evening session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
What does worshipping God mean for you and me?
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. item.title: The Times of Restitution of All Things
item.description:
The Times of Restitution of All Things by Elder David A. Bednar, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Morning session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
()

item.title: Participate to Prepare for Christ’s Return
item.description:
Participate to Prepare for Christ’s Return by Elder Steven D. Shumway, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Morning session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
Callings and other ways we embark in God’s work uniquely prepare us to meet the Savior.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Steven D. Shumway, Of the Seventy

item.title: Your Repentance Doesn’t Burden Jesus Christ; It Brightens His Joy
item.description:
Your Repentance Doesn’t Burden Jesus Christ; It Brightens His Joy by Sister Tamara W. Runia, First Counselor in the Young Women General Presidency given in the Sunday Morning session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
The invitation to repent is an expression of God’s love. Saying yes to that invitation is an expression of ours.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Sister Tamara W. Runia, First Counselor in the Young Women General Presidency

item.title: Compensating Blessings
item.description:
Compensating Blessings by Bishop Gérald Caussé, Presiding Bishop given in the Sunday Morning session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
While many circumstances in life may be beyond our control, none of us is beyond the reach of the Lord’s infinite blessings.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Bishop Gérald Caussé, Presiding Bishop

item.title: Eternity’s Great Gifts: Jesus Christ’s Atonement, Resurrection, Restoration
item.description:
Eternity’s Great Gifts: Jesus Christ’s Atonement, Resurrection, Restoration by Elder Gerrit W. Gong, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Morning session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
We find in Easter in Jesus Christ peace, becoming, and belonging—that which is enduringly real and joyful, happy and forever.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Gerrit W. Gong, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Joy Through Covenant Discipleship
item.description:
Joy Through Covenant Discipleship by Elder John A. McCune, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Morning session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
As we bind ourselves to act as covenant disciples, our relationship with the Father and Son is enriched, our joy enhanced, and our eternal perspective expanded.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder John A. McCune, Of the Seventy

item.title: Divine Helps for Mortality
item.description:
Divine Helps for Mortality by President Dallin H. Oaks, First Counselor in the First Presidency given in the Sunday Morning session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
Our Heavenly Father’s plan provides helps to guide us through our mortal journeys.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Dallin H. Oaks, First Counselor in the First Presidency

item.title: Reverence for Sacred Things
item.description:
Reverence for Sacred Things by Elder Ulisses Soares, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
Reverence for the sacred fosters genuine gratitude, expands true happiness, leads our minds to revelation, and brings greater joy to our lives.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Ulisses Soares, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Charity—a Sign of True Discipleship
item.description:
Charity—a Sign of True Discipleship by Elder Michael B. Strong, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
The real destination of discipleship is literally to become as Jesus Christ is.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Michael B. Strong, Of the Seventy

item.title: Beware the Second Temptation
item.description:
Beware the Second Temptation by Elder Scott D. Whiting, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
Don’t hide from those who will love and support you; rather, run to them.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Scott D. Whiting, Of the Seventy

item.title: Harden Not Your Heart
item.description:
Harden Not Your Heart by Elder Christopher H. Kim, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
If we sincerely repent, humble ourselves, and trust and rely on the Lord, our hearts will be softened.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Christopher H. Kim, Of the Seventy

item.title: Receive His Gift
item.description:
Receive His Gift by Elder Patrick Kearon, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
You are a beloved daughter of God, you are a cherished son of God, and He has gifted you His perfect, holy Son.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Patrick Kearon, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: The Love of God
item.description:
The Love of God by Elder Benjamin M. Z. Tai, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
I joyfully witness that the Savior Jesus Christ is the love of God. His love for us is perfect, personal, and perpetual.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Benjamin M. Z. Tai, Of the Seventy

item.title: Confidence in the Presence of God
item.description:
Confidence in the Presence of God by President Russell M. Nelson, President of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 195th Annual General Conference on Mon Mar 31 2025
As we diligently seek to have charity and virtue fill our lives, our confidence in approaching God will increase.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Russell M. Nelson, President of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
